subject: [GENERIC] follow elalto branches for submodules
commit_message:
[GENERIC] follow elalto branches for submodules

Instead of being fixed on a tag, let's follow the branches.

Issue-ID: OOM-2364
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I4fda0650f68172984dd7be1f4c717e89942c4655

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 3 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

We were tracking a tag which means updates done on branches were not picked up (in particular certificates)
